name: Whipper Earwig
description: A much more oppressive and versatile earwig that combines whip strikes, projectiles, and an awkward defensive stance. Between its reach, damage, and strange rhythm, it is one of the non-boss creatures most likely to break the flow of a fight.
behavior: It moves with intent and pressures through very awkward distance changes. It can force respect in melee, throw you off rhythm with the rock, and close the gap again before you recover control.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks head-on, changes distance, and forces very fast reactions. The community treats it as one of the nastiest non-boss creatures in the game, and for good reason.
interactionWithCreatures: It can enter combat if another creature invades its space.
strategy: It is a bad idea to obsess over blocking every part of the sequence. Waiting for the rock, the clumsy close-in, or the exit from the defensive stance is usually better, because trying to trade head-on is exactly how it wins.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 3-Hit Combo: 55. 5-Hit Combo: 55. Charged Pinch: 90. Tail Whip: 55. Rock Throw: 70.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A short sequence used to pin you in front of it before changing distance.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A longer chain meant to punish repeated blocking or panicked answers.

abilities.name: Charged Pinch
abilities.description: A slower heavy clamp that rewards a perfect block.

abilities.name: Tail Whip
abilities.description: A lateral sweep used to catch players escaping sideways.

abilities.name: Rock Throw
abilities.description: It throws a rock to break your rhythm if you try to fight from too far away.
